metarubrics.name: Included sections for QA
metarubrics.description: Did the model include the DATA FOR QUALITY ASSURANCE  section?

metarubrics.name: Listed faulty supplies
metarubrics.description: Did the model list supply {supply_ID} as faulty in DATA FOR QUALITY ASSURANCE  section?

metarubrics.name: Skipped not faulty supplies
metarubrics.description: Did the model not include supply {supply_ID} in the list of faulty supplies in DATA FOR QUALITY ASSURANCE  section?

metarubrics.name: Computed frequency of faulty supply
metarubrics.description: Did the model list that supply {supply_ID} has frequency {frequency} Hz in DATA FOR QUALITY ASSURANCE  section, or an equivalent value when rounded to the closest integer?

metarubrics.name: Listed batch of supply
metarubrics.description: Did the model list that supply {supply_ID} was manufactured in batch {batch} in DATA FOR QUALITY ASSURANCE  section?

metarubrics.name: Listed manufacturing machine of supply
metarubrics.description: Did the model list that supply {supply_ID} was manufactured by machine {machine} in DATA FOR QUALITY ASSURANCE section?

metarubrics.name: Included sections for management
metarubrics.description: Did the model include the DATA FOR MANAGEMENT  section?

metarubrics.name: Identified faulty machines
metarubrics.description: Did the model list machine {machine} as faulty in MACHINES(failure > 10%) in DATA FOR MANAGEMENT  section?

metarubrics.name: Skipped not faulty machines
metarubrics.description: Did the model not include machine {machine} in the MACHINES(failure > 10%) section??
